content: OFX/CSV client-side parsing: ofx-js (npm, pure JS, no deps, works in browser) handles OFX 1.x SGML and OFX 2.x XML auto-detection. ofx-data-extractor (TypeScript, browser+Node, strict/lenient modes). For CSV: use PapaParse (de facto standard, browser-native, handles encoding). Brazilian banks export OFX (Bradesco, Itau, Santander) or CSV; OFX format is consistent across Brazilian banks. Encoding issue: some Brazilian bank CSV files use ISO-8859-1 (Latin-1); FileReader API can decode with encoding param. No universal Brazilian bank CSV format — need per-bank column mapping.
